rationale: Valid pilot evidence at reduced sample (dev split only, {'t1a_straighten': 13, 't1b_single_bend': 14, 't1c_endpoint_reposition': 15} states/task vs registered 96/64); hidden confirmation and clean reproduction not executed, so Grade B is blocked by policy (DECISION_POLICY.md section 14). Dev-split effects exceed the preregistered minimum for at least one task. No candidate is formally selectable: the 0.02 invalid-table-rate guard is unsatisfiable at pilot n (placement-artifact tables are quarantined; all estimates descriptive C0). Registered full-set noop guard failed on state(s) excluded from all used tables; used-state noop passes (see guards).
label: pilot-dev-strict
claim_scope: contact-location choice vs fixed-magnitude planar-direction choice, one quasi-static primitive, DLOLabEnv only
